name: TextInput
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from examples/astryx/.astryx-sandbox/node_modules/@astryxdesign/core/src/TextInput/TextInput.tsx (react-tsx adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text for the input (always rendered for accessibility).

props.name: isLabelHidden
props.description: Whether to visually hide the label (still accessible to screen readers).

props.name: description
props.description: Description text displayed between the label and input.

props.name: isOptional
props.description: Whether the field is optional. Mutually exclusive with isRequired.

props.name: isRequired
props.description: Whether the field is required. Mutually exclusive with isOptional.

props.name: disabledMessage
props.description:
Explains why the input is disabled. When set together with `isDisabled`,
the input shows a tooltip with this text on hover and keyboard focus, and
stays focusable (via `aria-disabled`) so the reason is discoverable by
keyboard and assistive technology. The field cannot be edited (it becomes
read-only) while disabled.

Use this instead of wrapping a disabled input in `Tooltip` — disabled
controls don't emit the pointer events an external tooltip needs.

props.name: size
props.description:
The size of the input.
- 'sm': Compact size (18px height)
- 'md': Default size (26px height)

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Whether the input is in a loading state.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value of the input.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.

props.name: labelTooltip
props.description: Tooltip text to display in an info icon at the end of the label.

props.name: hasClear
props.description:
Whether to show a clear button when a value is set.
When clicked, resets the value to an empty string and returns focus to the input.

props.name: hasAutoFocus
props.description: Whether to automatically focus the input on mount.

props.name: htmlName
props.description:
The HTML name attribute for the input.
Useful for form submissions.

events.name: change
events.description: Callback fired when the input value changes.

events.name: enter
events.description: Callback fired when the user presses the Enter key.

events.name: keyDown
events.description: Callback fired on keydown events on the input.
